description: Consolidate duplicated useFreshData composable into the shared library, and consolidate duplicated inline formatDate functions into a shared utility. Both admin and portal have identical copies of useFreshData. Portal views (BillingView, SupportView, TicketThread) each define their own inline formatDate - these should use a single shared utility.
steps: Move panel/web/admin/src/composables/useFreshData.ts to panel/web/shared/composables/useFreshData.ts (the code is byte-for-byte identical between admin and portal versions).
Update panel/web/portal/src/views/UsageView.vue: change import from '@/composables/useFreshData' to '@koris/composables/useFreshData'.

Move panel/web/admin/src/composables/useFreshData.test.ts to panel/web/shared/composables/useFreshData.test.ts. Update the import in the test file from './useFreshData' to '@koris/composables/useFreshData' (this alias is already configured in shared/vitest.config.ts pattern). Actually keep it as './useFreshData' since the test now lives next to the source in shared/composables/.
Add '@koris/composables/useFreshData' alias to panel/web/shared/vitest.config.ts resolve aliases (for consistency with other composable aliases already listed there).

Create panel/web/shared/composables/useFormatDate.ts with a shared formatDate utility function that handles null/undefined/empty and formats dates using Intl.DateTimeFormat. This consolidates the 3+ inline formatDate implementations across portal views.
Update panel/web/portal/src/views/BillingView.vue: remove inline formatDate function, import formatDate from '@koris/composables/useFormatDate'.
Update panel/web/portal/src/views/SupportView.vue: remove inline formatDate function, import formatDate from '@koris/composables/useFormatDate'.
Update panel/web/portal/src/components/TicketThread.vue: remove inline formatDate function, import formatDate from '@koris/composables/useFormatDate'.
acceptance_criteria: useFreshData.ts exists only in panel/web/shared/composables/ (not in admin or portal src/composables/)
Portal views (BillingView, UsageView) import useFreshData from '@koris/composables/useFreshData'
A new useFormatDate.ts exists in panel/web/shared/composables/
No inline formatDate function remains in portal views (BillingView, SupportView, TicketThread)
All 3 portal files import formatDate from '@koris/composables/useFormatDate'
Shared vitest tests pass (npx vitest run in shared/)
verification: Run: grep -r 'useFreshData' panel/web/admin/src panel/web/portal/src -- should show only import from @koris/composables
Run: grep -rn 'function formatDate' panel/web/portal/src -- should find no inline definitions
Run: cd panel/web/shared && npx vitest run (if node_modules installed) to confirm useFreshData.test.ts passes in new location
findings: All changes implemented successfully. useFreshData moved to shared/composables with test passing. useFormatDate.ts created with formatDate and formatDateTime exports. Portal views updated to use shared imports. Vitest run in shared/ passes all 25 tests (3 test files). No inline formatDate definitions remain in portal src. Node modules were installed for shared/ to run verification tests. Review feedback addressed: added 13 unit tests for useFormatDate, clarified useFreshData is portal-only in COMPONENT_USAGE.md, added TODO for admin .slice(0,10) migration, added JSDoc note that useFormatDate exports are plain functions not composables.
